title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Daikin India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Daikin India
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India:
Daikin India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India!
